model Task {
  id                 BigInt            @id @default(autoincrement())
  companyId          BigInt            @map("company_id")
  createdBy          BigInt            @map("created_by")
  projectId          BigInt?           @map("project_id") // V3.6: 关联项目(可为空)
  taskNo             String?           @unique @map("task_no") @db.VarChar(20) // V3.7: TSK-YYYYMMDD-NNN
  title              String            @db.VarChar(100)
  description        String?           @db.Text // 背景 + 目标合并
  background         String?           @db.Text // V3.6: 项目背景
  objective          String?           @db.Text // V3.6: 交付目标
  taskMode           TaskMode          @map("task_mode")
  status             TaskStatus        @default(draft)
  priority           TaskPriority      @default(p2) // V3.7
  totalBudget        Decimal           @map("total_budget") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  lockedAmount       Decimal           @default(0) @map("locked_amount") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  startDate          DateTime?         @map("start_date")
  endDate            DateTime?         @map("end_date")
  workMode           WorkMode?         @map("work_mode") // remote/onsite/hybrid
  onsiteCity         String?           @map("onsite_city") @db.VarChar(20)
  onsiteAddress      String?           @map("onsite_address") @db.VarChar(100)
  address            String?           @db.VarChar(200) // 兼容旧字段
  communication      Json? // JSON: 沟通机制数组
  isConfidential     Boolean           @default(false) @map("is_confidential")
  overallProgress    Int               @default(0) @map("overall_progress") // 0-100
  acceptanceCriteria String?           @map("acceptance_criteria") @db.Text // V3.7
  riskLevel          RiskLevel         @default(green) @map("risk_level") // V3.7
  acceptanceStatus   AcceptanceStatus? @map("acceptance_status") // V3.7
  createdAt          DateTime          @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  publishedAt        DateTime?         @map("published_at")
  completedAt        DateTime?         @map("completed_at")
  updatedAt          DateTime          @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  company         Company          @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  project         Project?         @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  taskRoles       TaskRole[]
  deliverables    Deliverable[]
  attachments     TaskAttachment[]
  checkpoints     TaskCheckpoint[]
  comments        TaskComment[]
  issues          TaskIssue[]
  progressUpdates ProgressUpdate[]

  @@index([companyId, status])
  @@index([status, createdAt])
  @@index([projectId])
  @@index([companyId, priority]) // V3.7: 任务优先级筛选
  @@index([companyId, riskLevel]) // V3.7: 风险等级筛选
  @@map("tasks")
}

model TaskRole {

phase                ProjectPhase  @default(requirement) // V3.7
  expectedDeliveryDate DateTime?     @map("expected_delivery_date") @db.Date // V3.7
  riskLevel            RiskLevel     @default(green) @map("risk_level") // V3.7
  createdAt            DateTime      @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt            DateTime      @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  company    Company     @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  tasks      Task[]
  milestones Milestone[]

  @@index([companyId, status])
  @@index([companyId, phase]) // V3.7: 项目阶段筛选
  @@index([companyId, riskLevel]) // V3.7: 项目风险等级筛选
  @@index([expectedDeliveryDate]) // V3.7: 预警扫描 cron 用
  @@map("projects")
}

model Milestone {
  id          BigInt          @id @default(autoincrement())
  projectId   BigInt          @map("project_id")
  name        String          @db.VarChar(50)
  description String?         @db.VarChar(200)
  plannedDate DateTime        @map("planned_date") @db.Date
  completedAt DateTime?       @map("completed_at")
  status      MilestoneStatus @default(pending)
  sortOrder   Int             @map("sort_order")
  createdBy   BigInt          @map("created_by")
  createdAt   DateTime        @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt   DateTime        @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  project     Project               @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  attachments MilestoneAttachment[]

  @@index([projectId, sortOrder])
  @@map("milestones")
}

model MilestoneAttachment {
  id          BigInt   @id @default(autoincrement())
  milestoneId BigInt   @map("milestone_id")
  fileName    String   @map("file_name") @db.VarChar(200)
  fileUrl     String   @map("file_url") @db.VarChar(500)
  fileSize    BigInt   @map("file_size")
  fileType    String   @map("file_type") @db.VarChar(20)
  uploadedBy  BigInt   @map("uploaded_by")
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  milestone Milestone @relation(fields: [milestoneId], references: [id])

  @@index([milestoneId])
  @@map("milestone_attachments")
}

import request from './request'

export type TaskPriority = 'p0' | 'p1' | 'p2'
export type RiskLevel = 'green' | 'yellow' | 'red'
export type AcceptanceStatus = 'pending' | 'partial' | 'all_passed' | null

export const PRIORITY_LABEL: Record<TaskPriority, string> = {
  p0: 'P0 紧急',
  p1: 'P1 重要',
  p2: 'P2 常规',
}

export const PRIORITY_COLOR: Record<TaskPriority, string> = {
  p0: 'red',
  p1: 'orange',
  p2: 'blue',
}

export const RISK_LABEL: Record<RiskLevel, string> = {
  green: '正常',
  yellow: '关注',
  red: '风险',
}

export const RISK_COLOR: Record<RiskLevel, string> = {
  green: '#52c41a',
  yellow: '#faad14',
  red: '#ff4d4f',
}

export interface CreateTaskParams {
  title: string
  description?: string
  taskMode: 'task_package' | 'daily_rate'
  totalBudget: number
  startDate?: string
  endDate?: string
  address?: string
  /** V3.7 优先级 */
  priority?: TaskPriority
  /** V3.7 验收标准 */
  acceptanceCriteria?: string
  roles?: {
    roleName: string
    headcount: number
    budget: number
    skillTags?: string
    description?: string
  }[]
}

export interface TaskListParams {
  status?: string
  keyword?: string
  taskMode?: string
  /** V3.7 优先级筛选 */
  priority?: TaskPriority
  sortBy?: 'createdAt' | 'totalBudget' | 'publishedAt' | 'endDate' | 'priority'
  sortOrder?: 'asc' | 'desc'
  createdFrom?: string
  createdTo?: string
  hasPendingApplications?: boolean
  page?: number
  pageSize?: number
}

export const taskApi = {
  create: (data: CreateTaskParams) =>
    request.post<any, any>('/tasks', data),

  updateDraft: (id: number, data: Record<string, any>) =>
    request.put<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/draft`, data),

  setRoles: (id: number, roles: CreateTaskParams['roles']) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/roles`, { roles }),

  publish: (id: number) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/publish`),

  cancel: (id: number) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/cancel`),

  list: (params?: TaskListParams) =>
    request.get<any, any>('/tasks', { params }),

  detail: (id: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}`),

  /** W4: 任务详情（含角色+交付物完整数据） */
  detailFull: (id: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/full`),

  /** W4: 验收交付物 */
  review: (taskId: number, roleId: number, data: { result: 'approved' | 'rejected'; reviewNote?: string }) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/roles/${roleId}/review`, data),

  getPlatformRoles: () =>
    request.get<any, any>('/common/platform-roles'),

  getSkillTags: (category?: string) =>
    request.get<any, any>('/common/skill-tags', { params: { category } }),

  /** W4: 获取 OSS 直传预签名 URL */
  getPresignUrl: (data: { category: string; originalName: string; fileSize: number }) =>
    request.post<any, any>('/common/upload/presign', data),

  /** 附件管理 */
  listAttachments: (taskId: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/attachments`).then((r: any) => r.data || []),
  addAttachment: (taskId: number, data: {
    fileName: string; fileUrl: string; fileSize: number; fileType: string;
  }) => request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/attachments`, data).then((r: any) => r.data),
  deleteAttachment: (taskId: number, attachmentId: number) =>
    request.delete<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/attachments/${attachmentId}`),
}

All changes look good. Let me also verify the task creation page's `watch` section for the project change listener and that `loadDraft` loads milestones properly:

However, there's a subtlety: the `watch` on `form.projectId` will fire when `loadDraft` sets `form.projectId`, which would reset `milestoneId` to `null` and call `loadMilestones` again. But `loadDraft` sets `milestoneId` after the `loadMilestones` call, so the watch's `form.milestoneId = null` might interfere. Let me fix this by making the watch skip the first trigger in loadDraft context, or better, by loading milestones before setting projectId in loadDraft:

Actually, looking more carefully: `loadDraft` sets `form.projectId` first, which triggers the `watch`. The watch resets `milestoneId = null` and calls `loadMilestones(newId)`. Then `loadDraft` continues and awaits its own `loadMilestones` call (which will be a redundant fetch), then sets `milestoneId`. The watch's `loadMilestones` is an uncontrolled async call that runs in parallel, but since `loadDraft` also calls `loadMilestones` and `await`s it, the `milestoneOptions` will be loaded correctly by the time `form.milestoneId = task.milestoneId` runs.

The issue: the watch sets `form.milestoneId = null` SYNCHRONOUSLY. Then `loadDraft` code continues. But wait, `loadDraft` does `await loadMilestones(...)` and then `form.milestoneId = task.milestoneId`. So the sequence is:
1. `form.projectId = task.projectId` → triggers watch synchronously 
2. Watch sets `form.milestoneId = null` and calls `loadMilestones(newId)` (fire-and-forget since watch callback isn't awaited)
3. `loadDraft` continues: `await loadMilestones(task.projectId)` 
4. `form.milestoneId = task.milestoneId` ✅

This should work fine since step 4 happens after step 2. Let me double check that the uncontrolled `loadMilestones` from the watch doesn't overwrite `milestoneOptions` after step 4 - it wouldn't because both calls fetch the same data.

### 🔄 用户交互流程

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[新建/编辑任务] --> B{选择关联项目?}
    B -->|否| C[不显示里程碑选择]
    B -->|是| D[自动加载项目里程碑列表]
    D --> E{选择里程碑?}
    E -->|否| F[任务无里程碑标签]
    E -->|是| G[任务关联里程碑]
    G --> H[🏁 里程碑标签展示]
    H --> I[任务列表 · 标题后方]
    H --> J[任务详情 · 徽章区]
    H --> K[项目详情 · 关联任务列表]
    H --> L[任务抽屉 · 状态旁]
```

### ⚡ 部署步骤

1. 执行数据库 migration：`npx prisma migrate deploy`
2. 重启后端服务
3. 前端构建部署

}

model ProgressUpdate {

  taskRoleId   BigInt   @map("task_role_id")

  content      String?  @db.Text // 今日完成内容

  tomorrowPlan String?  @map("tomorrow_plan") @db.Text // V3.7
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  task Task @relation(fields: [taskId], references: [id])

  @@index([taskRoleId, createdAt(sort: Desc)])
  @@index([taskId, workerId])
  @@map("progress_updates")
}

// ============================================================
// 6. 财务相关表

model Wallet {
  id               BigInt   @id @default(autoincrement())
  workerId         BigInt   @unique @map("worker_id")
  availableBalance Decimal  @default(0) @map("available_balance") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  frozenBalance    Decimal  @default(0) @map("frozen_balance") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  totalEarned      Decimal  @default(0) @map("total_earned") @db.Decimal(12, 2)

  createdAt        DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt        DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  worker          Worker           @relation(fields: [workerId], references: [id])
  withdrawRecords WithdrawRecord[]

  @@map("wallets")
}
---
model TaskCheckpoint {

  submitContent     String?          @map("submit_content") @db.Text
  submitAttachments Json?            @map("submit_attachments") // JSON: URL数组
  submittedAt       DateTime?        @map("submitted_at")
  reviewComment     String?          @map("review_comment") @db.Text
  reviewedAt        DateTime?        @map("reviewed_at")
  revisionCount     Int              @default(0) @map("revision_count")
  sortOrder         Int              @map("sort_order")
  createdAt         DateTime         @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt         DateTime         @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  task Task @relation(fields: [taskId], references: [id])

  @@index([taskId, sortOrder])
  @@map("task_checkpoints")
}

## Goal
Separate the project number (`projectNo`) and project name (`name`) into two distinct columns in the enterprise-side project list table, which were previously combined in a single column.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Project is a Vue.js application using Ant Design Vue (`a-table`, `a-tag`, etc.)
- The project name column should remain a clickable link that navigates to the project detail page
- (none other explicitly mentioned)

- [x] Split the `columns` array definition: replaced single `{ title: '项目', key: 'name' }` with two entries: `{ title: '项目编号', key: 'projectNo', dataIndex: 'projectNo', width: 130 }` and `{ title: '项目名称', key: 'name', dataIndex: 'name' }`

- **Project number column width set to 130px**: Reasonable width for typical project number strings
- **Project number styled with `color:#666`**: Subtle gray to differentiate from the project name
- **Project name retains `font-weight:500` and click handler**: Preserves original navigation behavior to detail page

## Original Request
The user requested a feature where: after creating a project with milestone nodes, when creating a task and selecting an associated project, the user can also select one of that project's milestones, and the milestone should appear as a tag/label on the task.

## Early Progress
- Read and analyzed the full codebase: Prisma schema, backend project/task services & controllers, frontend task API, TaskCreatePage, TaskListPage, TaskDetailPage, and ProjectDetailPage
- Added `milestoneId` field to the Task model in Prisma schema with relation to Milestone

- Updated `ProjectService` to include milestone info in task data for project detail
- Updated frontend `CreateTaskParams` interface in `task.ts` API to include `projectId` and `milestoneId`
- Updated `TaskCreatePage.vue`: added `milestoneId` to form state, milestone options ref, `loadMilestones()` function, watcher on `form.projectId` with skip flag for draft loading, milestone selector UI that appears when project is selected, milestone tag preview, and draft loading logic
- Updated `TaskListPage.vue`: added milestone tag (🏁) next to task title in list and in task detail drawer
- Updated `TaskDetailPage.vue`: added milestone tag in the v37-badges area
- Updated `ProjectDetailPage.vue`: added milestone tag on associated tasks list

## Context for Suffix
- All 10 files have been modified and verified with grep counts
- The final verification confirmed the template HTML for the milestone selector in TaskCreatePage is well-formed
- A `_skipMilestoneReset` flag pattern was used to prevent the `watch` on `form.projectId` from clearing `milestoneId` during draft loading
- The milestone data flows: backend includes `milestone: { select: { id, name } }` in task queries → `formatTask` maps to `milestoneId`/`milestoneName` → frontend displays as cyan `<a-tag>` with 🏁 emoji

===
import request from './request'

export type TaskPriority = 'p0' | 'p1' | 'p2'
export type RiskLevel = 'green' | 'yellow' | 'red'
export type AcceptanceStatus = 'pending' | 'partial' | 'all_passed' | null

export const PRIORITY_LABEL: Record<TaskPriority, string> = {
  p0: 'P0 紧急',
  p1: 'P1 重要',
  p2: 'P2 常规',
}

export const PRIORITY_COLOR: Record<TaskPriority, string> = {
  p0: 'red',
  p1: 'orange',
  p2: 'blue',
}

export const RISK_LABEL: Record<RiskLevel, string> = {
  green: '正常',
  yellow: '关注',
  red: '风险',
}

export const RISK_COLOR: Record<RiskLevel, string> = {
  green: '#52c41a',
  yellow: '#faad14',
  red: '#ff4d4f',
}

export interface CreateTaskParams {
  title: string
  description?: string
  taskMode: 'task_package' | 'daily_rate'
  totalBudget: number
  startDate?: string
  endDate?: string
  address?: string
  /** V3.7 优先级 */
  priority?: TaskPriority
  /** V3.7 验收标准 */
  acceptanceCriteria?: string
  /** V3.8 关联项目 */
  projectId?: number
  /** V3.8 关联里程碑 */
  milestoneId?: number
  roles?: {
    roleName: string
    headcount: number
    budget: number
    skillTags?: string
    description?: string
  }[]
}

export interface TaskListParams {
  status?: string
  keyword?: string
  taskMode?: string
  /** V3.7 优先级筛选 */
  priority?: TaskPriority
  sortBy?: 'createdAt' | 'totalBudget' | 'publishedAt' | 'endDate' | 'priority'
  sortOrder?: 'asc' | 'desc'
  createdFrom?: string
  createdTo?: string
  hasPendingApplications?: boolean
  page?: number
  pageSize?: number
}

export const taskApi = {
  create: (data: CreateTaskParams) =>
    request.post<any, any>('/tasks', data),

  updateDraft: (id: number, data: Record<string, any>) =>
    request.put<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/draft`, data),

  setRoles: (id: number, roles: CreateTaskParams['roles']) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/roles`, { roles }),

  publish: (id: number) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/publish`),

  cancel: (id: number) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/cancel`),

  list: (params?: TaskListParams) =>
    request.get<any, any>('/tasks', { params }),

  detail: (id: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}`),

  /** W4: 任务详情（含角色+交付物完整数据） */
  detailFull: (id: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/full`),

  /** W4: 验收交付物 */
  review: (taskId: number, roleId: number, data: { result: 'approved' | 'rejected'; reviewNote?: string }) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/roles/${roleId}/review`, data),

  getPlatformRoles: () =>
    request.get<any, any>('/common/platform-roles'),

  getSkillTags: (category?: string) =>
    request.get<any, any>('/common/skill-tags', { params: { category } }),

  /** W4: 获取 OSS 直传预签名 URL */
  getPresignUrl: (data: { category: string; originalName: string; fileSize: number }) =>
    request.post<any, any>('/common/upload/presign', data),

  /** 附件管理 */
  listAttachments: (taskId: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/attachments`).then((r: any) => r.data || []),
  addAttachment: (taskId: number, data: {
    fileName: string; fileUrl: string; fileSize: number; fileType: string;
  }) => request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/attachments`, data).then((r: any) => r.data),
  deleteAttachment: (taskId: number, attachmentId: number) =>
    request.delete<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/attachments/${attachmentId}`),
}

content.text:
195:model Task {
790:model Milestone {

model Task {
  id                 BigInt            @id @default(autoincrement())
  companyId          BigInt            @map("company_id")
  createdBy          BigInt            @map("created_by")
  projectId          BigInt?           @map("project_id") // V3.6: 关联项目(可为空)
  milestoneId        BigInt?           @map("milestone_id") // V3.8: 关联里程碑(可为空)
  taskNo             String?           @unique @map("task_no") @db.VarChar(20) // V3.7: TSK-YYYYMMDD-NNN
  title              String            @db.VarChar(100)
  description        String?           @db.Text // 背景 + 目标合并
  background         String?           @db.Text // V3.6: 项目背景
  objective          String?           @db.Text // V3.6: 交付目标
  taskMode           TaskMode          @map("task_mode")
  status             TaskStatus        @default(draft)
  priority           TaskPriority      @default(p2) // V3.7
  totalBudget        Decimal           @map("total_budget") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  lockedAmount       Decimal           @default(0) @map("locked_amount") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  startDate          DateTime?         @map("start_date")
  endDate            DateTime?         @map("end_date")
  workMode           WorkMode?         @map("work_mode") // remote/onsite/hybrid
  onsiteCity         String?           @map("onsite_city") @db.VarChar(20)
  onsiteAddress      String?           @map("onsite_address") @db.VarChar(100)
  address            String?           @db.VarChar(200) // 兼容旧字段
  communication      Json? // JSON: 沟通机制数组
  isConfidential     Boolean           @default(false) @map("is_confidential")
  overallProgress    Int               @default(0) @map("overall_progress") // 0-100
  acceptanceCriteria String?           @map("acceptance_criteria") @db.Text // V3.7
  riskLevel          RiskLevel         @default(green) @map("risk_level") // V3.7
  acceptanceStatus   AcceptanceStatus? @map("acceptance_status") // V3.7
  createdAt          DateTime          @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  publishedAt        DateTime?         @map("published_at")
  completedAt        DateTime?         @map("completed_at")
  updatedAt          DateTime          @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  company         Company          @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  project         Project?         @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  milestone       Milestone?       @relation(fields: [milestoneId], references: [id])
  taskRoles       TaskRole[]
  deliverables    Deliverable[]
  attachments     TaskAttachment[]
  checkpoints     TaskCheckpoint[]
  comments        TaskComment[]
  issues          TaskIssue[]
  progressUpdates ProgressUpdate[]

  @@index([companyId, status])
  @@index([status, createdAt])
  @@index([projectId])
  @@index([milestoneId]) // V3.8: 里程碑关联筛选
  @@index([companyId, priority]) // V3.7: 任务优先级筛选
  @@index([companyId, riskLevel]) // V3.7: 风险等级筛选
  @@map("tasks")
}

model TaskRole {
  id                  BigInt         @id @default(autoincrement())
  taskId              BigInt         @map("task_id")
  platformRoleId      BigInt?        @map("platform_role_id")
  roleName            String         @map("role_name") @db.VarChar(50)
  level               RoleLevel? // junior/mid/senior/expert
  headcount           Int            @default(1)
  billingType         BillingType    @default(fixed) @map("billing_type")
  rate                Decimal        @default(0) @db.Decimal(10, 2) // 单价(固定总价 or 日薪)
  estimatedDays       Int?           @map("estimated_days")
  budget              Decimal        @db.Decimal(10, 2) // 岗位总预算(兼容)
  description         String?        @db.Text
  requiredSkills      Json?          @map("required_skills") // JSON: 必备技能
  bonusSkills         Json?          @map("bonus_skills") // JSON: 加分技能
  specialRequirements String?        @map("special_requirements") @db.Text
  skillTags           String?        @map("skill_tags") @db.VarChar(500) // 兼容旧格式
  status              TaskRoleStatus @default(pending)
  progress            Int            @default(0)
  createdAt           DateTime       @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  task         Task              @relation(fields: [taskId], references: [id])
  platformRole PlatformRole?     @relation(fields: [platformRoleId], references: [id])
  assignments  RoleAssignment[]
  applications TaskApplication[]

  @@index([taskId])
  @@map("task_roles")
}

model RoleAssignment {
  id           BigInt           @id @default(autoincrement())
  taskRoleId   BigInt           @map("task_role_id")
  workerId     BigInt           @map("worker_id")
  slotIndex    Int              @map("slot_index")
  status       AssignmentStatus @default(invited)
  invitedAt    DateTime         @default(now()) @map("invited_at")
  respondedAt  DateTime?        @map("responded_at")
  acceptedAt   DateTime?        @map("accepted_at")
  rejectedAt   DateTime?        @map("rejected_at")
  rejectReason String?          @map("reject_reason") @db.VarChar(200)
  expiredAt    DateTime?        @map("expired_at")
  contractHash String?          @map("contract_hash") @db.VarChar(64)
  signedAt     DateTime?        @map("signed_at")
===
model Milestone {
  id          BigInt          @id @default(autoincrement())
  projectId   BigInt          @map("project_id")
  name        String          @db.VarChar(50)
  description String?         @db.VarChar(200)
  plannedDate DateTime        @map("planned_date") @db.Date
  completedAt DateTime?       @map("completed_at")
  status      MilestoneStatus @default(pending)
  sortOrder   Int             @map("sort_order")
  createdBy   BigInt          @map("created_by")
  createdAt   DateTime        @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt   DateTime        @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  project     Project               @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  tasks       Task[]
  attachments MilestoneAttachment[]

  @@index([projectId, sortOrder])
  @@map("milestones")
}

arguments.content:
# V3.9 任务全生命周期增强计划

## 需求总览

在现有 7 态任务状态机基础上，插入「待付款」状态，并完善从招募→审批→执行→验收→付款→完成的完整闭环，同时增加基于任务模板节点的执行过程展示。

---

## 一、状态机改造：新增 `pending_payment`（待付款）

**现有状态链：**
```
draft → pending_review → published → in_progress → reviewing → completed → closed
```

**新状态链（8 态）：**
```
draft → pending_review → published → in_progress → reviewing → pending_payment → completed → closed
```

### 改动文件

| # | 文件 | 改动 |
|---|------|------|
| 1 | `prisma/schema.prisma` | `TaskStatus` 枚举新增 `pending_payment`；`CompanyNotificationType` 新增 `acceptance_request` |
| 2 | `prisma/migrations/2026..._v3_9.../migration.sql` | ALTER TYPE 添加新枚举值 |
| 3 | `task-status.machine.ts` | 转换表：`reviewing → [pending_payment, in_progress]`，`pending_payment → [completed]`；状态中文标签新增"待付款" |

---

## 二、后端 API 新增/修改

### 2.1 任务审批（招募完成后 → 进行中）

企业在任务详情中确认审批，将 `published → in_progress`。

| # | 文件 | 改动 |
|---|------|------|
| 4 | `task.controller.ts` | 新增 `POST /tasks/:id/approve`（企业审批任务） |
| 5 | `task.service.ts` | 新增 `approveTask()` 方法，校验 `published → in_progress` 转换 |

### 2.2 零工发起验收申请

零工完成任务后发起"验收申请"，任务变为 `reviewing`。

| # | 文件 | 改动 |
|---|------|------|
| 6 | `assignment.controller.ts` | 新增 `POST /worker/tasks/:assignmentId/request-acceptance`（零工发起验收申请） |
| 7 | `task.service.ts` | 新增 `requestAcceptance()` 方法：校验 `in_progress → reviewing`，创建企业通知 |

### 2.3 企业验收确认/驳回

企业在任务详情中对验收进行确认或驳回。

| # | 文件 | 改动 |
|---|------|------|
| 8 | `task.controller.ts` | 新增 `POST /tasks/:id/accept`（验收确认）和 `POST /tasks/:id/reject-acceptance`（验收驳回） |
| 9 | `task.service.ts` | 新增 `acceptTask()` 方法：`reviewing → pending_payment`，同时在 Transaction 表生成待付款记录；新增 `rejectAcceptance()` 方法：`reviewing → in_progress` 退回 |

### 2.4 支付完成 → 已完成

财务中心完成支付后，任务从 `pending_payment → completed`。

| # | 文件 | 改动 |
|---|------|------|
| 10 | `finance.controller.ts` | 新增 `POST /finance/tasks/:taskId/pay`（确认付款） |
| 11 | `finance.service.ts` | 新增 `payForTask()` 方法：创建 settlement 类型交易，更新交易状态为 completed，将任务状态从 `pending_payment → completed`，解锁资金 |

### 2.5 任务执行过程节点 API

按任务模板节点列出执行过程，聚合每个节点的状态、进度、日报、附件。

| # | 文件 | 改动 |
|---|------|------|
| 12 | `task.controller.ts` | 新增 `GET /tasks/:id/execution-nodes`（任务执行节点列表） |
| 13 | `task.service.ts` | 新增 `getExecutionNodes()` 方法：查询 checkpoints + progress_updates（按节点分组的日报）+ attachments（过程交付物），返回结构化节点数据 |

---

## 三、零工小程序端（Taro）

### 3.1 发起验收申请

| # | 文件 | 改动 |
|---|------|------|
| 14 | `worker-mp/src/api/task.ts` | 新增 `requestAcceptance(assignmentId)` API 方法 |
| 15 | `worker-mp/src/subpackages/task/pages/execute/index.tsx` | 进度 100% 时显示「发起验收申请」按钮，调用 API |

---

## 四、企业端前端（pc-admin）

### 4.1 任务广场 Tab 增加「待付款」

| # | 文件 | 改动 |
|---|------|------|
| 16 | `TaskListPage.vue` | Tabs 中在「验收中」后、「已完成」前新增 `pending_payment`（待付款）Tab，附带 badge 计数；`statusLabelMap`/`statusClassMap` 新增 `pending_payment` 映射；新增对应 CSS 样式 |

### 4.2 任务详情抽屉增加审批/验收按钮

| # | 文件 | 改动 |
|---|------|------|
| 17 | `TaskListPage.vue`（抽屉部分） | 当 `status === 'published'` 且所有角色已满员时显示「审批通过 → 开始执行」按钮；当 `status === 'reviewing'` 显示「验收确认」和「驳回」按钮；调用新 API |

### 4.3 任务详情页增加审批/验收操作

| # | 文件 | 改动 |
|---|------|------|
| 18 | `TaskDetailPage.vue` | 顶部操作栏：`published` 状态新增「审批通过」按钮；`reviewing` 状态新增「验收确认」「驳回」按钮；`drawerStatusLabel`/`drawerStatusColor` 新增 `pending_payment` 映射 |

### 4.4 任务执行过程节点展示（新组件）

| # | 文件 | 改动 |
|---|------|------|
| 19 | `components/task/TaskExecutionNodes.vue`（新建） | 按模板节点展示执行过程的组件，每个节点显示：① 节点名称/状态标签 ② 任务进度条 ③ 工作日志（日报汇总） ④ 过程交付物（附件列表） |
| 20 | `TaskDetailPage.vue` | V3.7 Tabs 中新增「📊 执行过程」Tab，使用 `TaskExecutionNodes` 组件 |

### 4.5 前端 API 层更新

| # | 文件 | 改动 |
|---|------|------|
| 21 | `api/task.ts` | 新增 `approveTask(id)`、`acceptTask(id)`、`rejectAcceptance(id, reason)`、`getExecutionNodes(id)` 方法 |
| 22 | `api/finance.ts` | 新增 `payForTask(taskId)` 方法 |

---

## 五、流程图

```
零工完成任务 ──→ 发起"验收申请" ──→ 企业收到消息通知
                                       │
                              ┌────────┴────────┐
                              ↓                  ↓
                        验收确认              验收驳回
                        reviewing →          reviewing →
                        pending_payment      in_progress
                              │
                              ↓
                      财务中心生成待付款记录
                              │
                              ↓
                        完成支付流程
                        pending_payment →
                        completed
                              │
                              ↓
                    财务记录变为已付款
                    任务进入"已完成"
```

---

## 六、涉及文件清单

| 层 | 文件 | 操作 |
|----|------|------|
| DB | `prisma/schema.prisma` | 修改（枚举扩展） |
| DB | `prisma/migrations/20260427060000_v3_9_.../migration.sql` | 新建 |
| 后端 | `task-status.machine.ts` | 修改 |
| 后端 | `task.controller.ts` | 修改 |
| 后端 | `task.service.ts` | 修改 |
| 后端 | `task/dto/index.ts` | 修改（新增 RejectAcceptanceDto） |
| 后端 | `assignment.controller.ts` | 修改 |
| 后端 | `finance.controller.ts` | 修改 |
| 后端 | `finance.service.ts` | 修改 |
| 小程序 | `worker-mp/src/api/task.ts` | 修改 |
| 小程序 | `worker-mp/.../execute/index.tsx` | 修改 |
| 前端 | `pc-admin/src/api/task.ts` | 修改 |
| 前端 | `pc-admin/src/api/finance.ts` | 修改 |
| 前端 | `TaskListPage.vue` | 修改 |
| 前端 | `TaskDetailPage.vue` | 修改 |
| 前端 | `components/task/TaskExecutionNodes.vue` | 新建 |

共 **16 个文件**（14 修改 + 2 新建）

招募中] C --> D[in_progress
进行中] D --> E[reviewing
验收中] E --> F[pending_payment
待付款] F --> G[completed
已完成] G --> H[closed] E -->|驳回| D C -->|取消| I[cancelled] ``` ### 🔧 后端 API 新增 | 端点 | 方法 | 功能 | |------|------|------| | `POST /tasks/:id/approve` | 企业审批 | published → in_progress | | `POST /worker/tasks/:id/request-acceptance` | 零工申请 | in_progress → reviewing + 通知 | | `POST /tasks/:id/accept` | 验收确认 | reviewing → pending_payment | | `POST /tasks/:id/reject-acceptance` | 验收驳回 | reviewing → in_progress | | `POST /finance/tasks/:taskId/pay` | 确认付款 | pending_payment → completed + 结算流水 | | `GET /tasks/:id/execution-nodes` | 执行节点 | 返回检查点 + 日报 + 附件 | ### 🎨 企业端 UI - **任务广场**新增「待付款」Tab（验收中和已完成之间） - **任务详情抽屉**新增：审批通过 / 验收确认 / 验收驳回 / 确认付款 按钮 - **任务详情页**新增同样的操作按钮 + 「📊 执行过程」Tab - **TaskExecutionNodes** 组件：按模板节点展示任务状态、进度、工作日志、过程交付物 ### 📱 零工小程序 - 执行页面进度 100% 时显示「📩 发起验收申请」按钮 - 发起后企业端收到站内通知

summary:
## Goal
1. Separate project number and project name into two distinct columns in the enterprise-side project list table
2. Allow tasks to be associated with a project's milestone, displaying the milestone as a tag/label on tasks
3. **NEW (V3.9)**: Implement full task lifecycle enhancement — add "pending_payment" status, task approval flow, worker acceptance requests, enterprise acceptance confirm/reject, payment integration, and task execution process nodes display

## Constraints & Preferences
- Vue.js application using Ant Design Vue (`a-table`, `a-tag`, etc.)
- Worker mini-program uses Taro (React/TSX)
- Existing 7-state task status machine must be extended to 8 states
- Backend uses NestJS + Prisma ORM
- Company notifications via `CompanyNotificationService.create()`
- Finance module already has Transaction model with `PaymentStatus` enum and recharge/lock/settlement flows
- TaskCheckpoint model already exists for quality gates/progress checks
- ProgressUpdate model stores daily reports (dailySummary, tomorrowPlan, issues, screenshots)

## Progress
### Done
- [x] Split project number/name columns in `ProjectListPage.vue`
- [x] Added `milestoneId` to Task model, migration, DTOs, services, and all frontend pages (10 files)
- [x] V3.8 milestone feature fully completed and verified
- [x] **V3.9 Planning**: Thoroughly analyzed existing codebase — task status machine, task controller/service, finance controller/service, assignment controller, worker-mp task API/pages, notification system, Prisma schema (TaskCheckpoint, ProgressUpdate, Transaction, CompanyNotification models)
- [x] **V3.9 Planning**: Wrote comprehensive implementation plan at `/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/sessions/260427-prime-lynx/plans/v3.9-task-lifecycle-plan.md`
- [x] **V3.9 Planning**: Submitted plan for user review via `SubmitPlan`

### In Progress
- [ ] V3.9 implementation — awaiting user approval of plan

### Blocked
- Plan submitted, waiting for user feedback before implementation begins

## Key Decisions
- **Project number column width set to 130px**: Reasonable for typical project number strings
- **Milestone `_skipMilestoneReset` flag pattern**: Prevents watch on `form.projectId` from clearing `milestoneId` during draft loading
- **V3.9 new status `pending_payment`**: Inserted between `reviewing` and `completed` in the 8-state machine: `draft → pending_review → published → in_progress → reviewing → pending_payment → completed → closed`
- **V3.9 approval flow**: `published → in_progress` via enterprise approve; `in_progress → reviewing` via worker acceptance request; `reviewing → pending_payment` via enterprise acceptance confirm; `reviewing → in_progress` via rejection; `pending_payment → completed` via payment confirmation
- **V3.9 finance integration**: Acceptance confirmation generates a `pending` Transaction record; payment completion updates it to `completed` and transitions task to `completed`
- **V3.9 execution nodes**: New `GET /tasks/:id/execution-nodes` endpoint aggregating checkpoints + progress_updates (daily reports) + attachments per node
- **V3.9 scope**: 16 files total (14 modified + 2 new), spanning DB/backend/worker-mp/pc-admin

## Next Steps
1. Await user feedback on V3.9 plan
2. Implement DB changes: extend `TaskStatus` enum with `pending_payment`, add `acceptance_request` to `CompanyNotificationType`, create migration
3. Update `task-status.machine.ts` transition table and labels
4. Implement backend APIs: `approveTask`, `requestAcceptance`, `acceptTask`, `rejectAcceptance`, `payForTask`, `getExecutionNodes`
5. Update worker-mp: add `requestAcceptance` API method and "发起验收申请" button in execute page
6. Update pc-admin: add "待付款" tab, approval/acceptance buttons, `TaskExecutionNodes.vue` component
7. Update frontend API layers (`api/task.ts`, `api/finance.ts`)

## Critical Context
- **Status machine file**: `/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/backend/src/modules/task/task-status.machine.ts` — current transitions: `reviewing → [completed, in_progress]`, `completed → [closed]`
- **Task service key methods**: `publishTask()` auto-approves `draft→pending_review→published`; `reviewDeliverable()` handles per-role acceptance and auto-completes task when all assignments done
- **Finance service**: Has `lockFundsForTask()`, `handlePayCallback()`, `getBalance()`, `getTransactions()` — new `payForTask()` will extend this
- **Assignment controller** (`/worker/tasks`): Already has accept/reject/progress/deliverables endpoints; need to add `POST /worker/tasks/:assignmentId/request-acceptance`
- **Worker-mp execute page**: `/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/worker-mp/src/subpackages/task/pages/execute/index.tsx` — has progress update UI, needs acceptance request button
- **CompanyNotificationService**: `create(dto)` method at `/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/backend/src/modules/notification/company-notification.service.ts`
- **Existing TaskCheckpoint model** (line 971 in schema): Has `CheckpointType` (progress_check, quality_gate) and `CheckpointStatus` (pending, submitted, passed, rejected, overdue)
- **Plan file**: `/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/sessions/260427-prime-lynx/plans/v3.9-task-lifecycle-plan.md`

---

**Turn Context (split turn):**

## Original Request
The user approved a plan (V3.9) for task lifecycle enhancement and asked the assistant to execute it.

## Early Progress
1. **Database Layer**: Added `pending_payment` to `TaskStatus` enum and `acceptance_request` to `CompanyNotificationType` enum in Prisma schema, plus created a SQL migration file.
2. **State Machine**: Updated `task-status.machine.ts` from 7-state to 8-state machine, adding `pending_payment` state between `reviewing` and `completed`. Updated transitions: `reviewing → pending_payment → completed`. Updated status labels.
3. **DTO**: Added `RejectAcceptanceDto` class with `reason` field (min 5, max 500 chars) and added `MinLength` import.
4. **TaskService New Methods**: Injected `CompanyNotificationService` into TaskService constructor. Added 5 new methods:
   - `approveTask()`: published → in_progress
   - `requestAcceptance()`: Worker initiates acceptance (in_progress → reviewing), sends company notification
   - `acceptTask()`: Company confirms acceptance (reviewing → pending_payment)
   - `rejectAcceptance()`: Company rejects acceptance (reviewing → in_progress)
   - `getExecutionNodes()`: Returns task execution timeline with checkpoints, daily logs, and attachments organized by nodes

## Context for Suffix
- The assistant was about to check if `reviewDeliverable` method needs updating (since the old flow went reviewing → completed, now it should go reviewing → pending_payment)
- The `formatTask` private helper method was just examined (lines 460-480) - it formats task data for API responses
- The task service file is ~778+ lines with methods for CRUD, progress updates, deliverables, attachments
- The execution plan follows dependency order: Database → Backend → Mini-program (小程序) → Enterprise frontend (企业前端). Steps 1-4 (database, state machine, DTO, service methods) are done. Still needed: controller routes, mini-program changes, and enterprise frontend (PC admin) changes.

content.text: 在进行邀约时报错
让我先查看相关的错误信息和邀约相关代码：
现在让我检查前端邀约相关的代码来定位错误：

197:      v-model:open="inviteDrawerVisible"
198:      :title="`邀约零工 — ${inviteRole?.roleName || ''}`"
205:        <div v-for="w in recommendedWorkers" :key="w.workerId" class="invite-worker-card">
216:            @click="handleInviteWorker(w)"
303:  invited: 'orange', accepted: 'green', rejected: 'red', expired: 'default', completed: 'purple',
306:  invited: '待接单', accepted: '执行中', rejected: '已拒绝', expired: '已过期', completed: '已完成',
440:const inviteDrawerVisible = ref(false)
441:const inviteRole = ref<any>(null)
447:  inviteRole.value = role
448:  inviteDrawerVisible.value = true
466:async function handleInviteWorker(worker: any) {
467:  if (!inviteRole.value) return
470:    await request.post(`/tasks/${taskId}/roles/${inviteRole.value.taskRoleId}/invite/${worker.workerId}`)
472:    inviteDrawerVisible.value = false
544:.invite-worker-card {
554:.invite-worker-card:hover {
我看到问题了。前端调用的路径是 `/tasks/${taskId}/roles/${roleId}/invite/${workerId}`，但实际后端路由注册在 **AssignmentController** 上，路径是 `tasks/:taskId/roles/:roleId/invite/:workerId`。让我确认 AssignmentController 的完整路由前缀：

路由前缀是 `@Controller()` 即根路径，路由是 `tasks/:taskId/roles/:roleId/invite/:workerId` — 前端调用路径一致。

问题可能不在路由映射上。让我仔细看看会不会是因为 V3.9 修改了 `task.controller.ts`，新增的 `@Get(':id/execution-nodes')` 路由和 `@Post(':id/approve')` 等路由与已有的 `@Get(':id')` 和 `@Get(':id/full')` 产生了冲突或路由匹配问题。

等等，更可能的原因是——我刚才修改 `assignment.controller.ts` 时，闭合大括号可能出了问题。让我检查：
控制器结构完全正确。让我检查后端是否能正常编译：

src/modules/finance/finance.service.ts(231,9): error TS2367: This comparison appears to be unintentional because the types 'TaskStatus' and '"pending_payment"' have no overlap.
src/modules/project/project.service.ts(139,13): error TS2353: Object literal may only specify known properties, and 'milestoneId' does not exist in type 'TaskSelect<DefaultArgs>'.
src/modules/task/task.service.ts(50,11): error TS2353: Object literal may only specify known properties, and 'milestoneId' does not exist in type 'Without<TaskCreateInput, TaskUncheckedCreateInput> & TaskUncheckedCreateInput'.
src/modules/task/task.service.ts(238,11): error TS2353: Object literal may only specify known properties, and 'milestone' does not exist in type 'TaskInclude<DefaultArgs>'.
src/modules/task/task.service.ts(308,9): error TS2353: Object literal may only specify known properties, and 'milestone' does not exist in type 'TaskInclude<DefaultArgs>'.
src/modules/task/task.service.ts(332,24): error TS2339: Property 'taskRoles' does not exist on type '{ id: bigint; companyId: bigint; description: string | null; status: TaskStatus; riskLevel: RiskLevel; createdAt: Date; updatedAt: Date; projectId: bigint | null; ... 21 more ...; publishedAt: Date | null; }'.
src/modules/task/task.service.ts(375,26): error TS2339: Property 'deliverables' does not exist on type '{ id: bigint; companyId: bigint; description: string | null; status: TaskStatus; riskLevel: RiskLevel; createdAt: Date; updatedAt: Date; projectId: bigint | null; ... 21 more ...; publishedAt: Date | null; }'.
src/modules/task/task.service.ts(641,9): error TS2353: Object literal may only specify known properties, and 'milestone' does not exist in type 'TaskInclude<DefaultArgs>'.
src/modules/task/task.service.ts(817,9): error TS2322: Type '"acceptance_request"' is not assignable to type 'CompanyNotificationType'.

找到了！编译错误。关键问题：

1. **`pending_payment` 和 `acceptance_request` 不被 Prisma 类型识别** — 因为 migration 还没执行，且 Prisma Client 还没重新生成
2. **`milestoneId` 相关错误** — 同样是 V3.8 migration 后 Prisma Client 未重新生成

这些都是因为 **Prisma Client 没有根据新的 schema 重新生成**。需要运行 `prisma generate`。但首先让我确认这就是邀约报错的原因——如果后端项目是靠 `prisma generate` 前的旧类型运行的，那 TypeScript 编译会失败，后端起不来。

让我运行 prisma generate：

warn The configuration property `package.json#prisma` is deprecated and will be removed in Prisma 7. Please migrate to a Prisma config file (e.g., `prisma.config.ts`).
For more information, see: https://pris.ly/prisma-config

Loaded Prisma config from prisma.config.ts.

warn The Prisma config file in prisma.config.ts overrides the deprecated `package.json#prisma` property in package.json.
  For more information, see: https://pris.ly/prisma-config

Prisma config detected, skipping environment variable loading.
Prisma schema loaded from prisma/schema.prisma

✔ Generated Prisma Client (v6.19.3) to ./../../node_modules/.pnpm/@prisma+client@6.19.3_prisma@6.19.3_typescript@5.9.3__typescript@5.9.3/node_modules/@prisma/client in 141ms

Start by importing your Prisma Client (See: https://pris.ly/d/importing-client)

Tip: Need your database queries to be 1000x faster? Accelerate offers you that and more: https://pris.ly/tip-2-accelerate
Prisma Client 重新生成成功。现在再次检查编译：
(no output)

✅ **零编译错误！** 所有 TypeScript 类型检查通过。

问题的根因是：**之前添加了 `milestoneId`（V3.8）和 `pending_payment` / `acceptance_request`（V3.9）到 Prisma schema，但没有执行 `prisma generate` 重新生成 Prisma Client**，导致后端编译失败、无法启动，邀约请求自然报错。

---

## ✅ 已修复

运行了 `npx prisma generate`，Prisma Client 现在包含了所有新类型：
- `TaskStatus.pending_payment`
- `CompanyNotificationType.acceptance_request`  
- `Task.milestoneId` 关联字段

后端编译 **0 错误**，重新启动后邀约功能应恢复正常。

> ⚠️ 如果数据库还没执行 migration，还需要运行：
> ```bash
> npx prisma migrate deploy
> ```
> 来让数据库也同步新的枚举值和字段。

model Worker {
  id               BigInt       @id @default(autoincrement())
  openid           String       @unique @db.VarChar(64)
  unionid          String?      @db.VarChar(64)
  nickname         String?      @db.VarChar(50)
  phone            String?      @db.VarChar(200) // AES-256-CBC 加密存储
  realName         String?      @map("real_name") @db.VarChar(100)
  idCardHash       String?      @map("id_card_hash") @db.VarChar(64)
  idCardEncrypted  String?      @map("id_card_encrypted") @db.VarChar(500)
  avatarUrl        String?      @map("avatar_url") @db.VarChar(500)
  city             String?      @db.VarChar(50)
  bio              String?      @db.VarChar(300)
  skillTags        Json?        @map("skill_tags") // JSON: 技能标签数组
  isVerified       Boolean      @default(false) @map("is_verified")
  avgRating        Decimal      @default(0) @map("avg_rating") @db.Decimal(3, 2)
  completionRate   Decimal      @default(0) @map("completion_rate") @db.Decimal(5, 4)
  completedCount   Int          @default(0) @map("completed_count")
  level            WorkerLevel  @default(unverified)
  avgResponseHours Decimal?     @map("avg_response_hours") @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  coverImage       String?      @map("cover_image") @db.VarChar(500)
  coverTemplate    String?      @map("cover_template") @db.VarChar(20)
  status           WorkerStatus @default(active)
  createdAt        DateTime     @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt        DateTime     @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  wallet       Wallet?
  workerRoles  WorkerRole[]
  portfolios   Portfolio[]
  assignments  RoleAssignment[]
  applications TaskApplication[]
  companyPools CompanyWorkerPool[]

  @@index([city, isVerified])
  @@index([level, avgRating(sort: Desc)])
  @@map("workers")
}

model WorkerRole {
  id             BigInt     @id @default(autoincrement())
  workerId       BigInt     @map("worker_id")
  platformRoleId BigInt?    @map("platform_role_id")
  roleName       String     @map("role_name") @db.VarChar(50)
  level          RoleLevel? // junior/mid/senior/expert
  yearsExp       Int?       @map("years_exp")
  minDailyRate   Decimal?   @map("min_daily_rate") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  maxDailyRate   Decimal?   @map("max_daily_rate") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  skillTags      Json?      @map("skill_tags") // JSON: 角色专属技能标签
  experienceDesc String?    @map("experience_desc") @db.VarChar(300)
  isAccepting    Boolean    @default(true) @map("is_accepting")
  completedCount Int        @default(0) @map("completed_count")
  avgRating      Decimal    @default(0) @map("avg_rating") @db.Decimal(3, 2)
  createdAt      DateTime   @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  worker       Worker        @relation(fields: [workerId], references: [id])
  platformRole PlatformRole? @relation(fields: [platformRoleId], references: [id])

  @@index([workerId])
  @@map("worker_roles")
}

model Portfolio {
  id          BigInt            @id @default(autoincrement())
  workerId    BigInt            @map("worker_id")
  title       String            @db.VarChar(100)
  description String?           @db.VarChar(500)
  fileUrl     String            @map("file_url") @db.VarChar(500)
  fileType    PortfolioFileType @map("file_type")
  isFeatured  Boolean           @default(false) @map("is_featured")
  visibility  Visibility        @default(public_visible)
  sortOrder   Int               @default(0) @map("sort_order")
  createdAt   DateTime          @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  worker Worker @relation(fields: [workerId], references: [id])

  @@index([workerId])
  @@map("portfolios")
}

// ============================================================
// 3. 任务相关表 (PRD §4.2 + V3.6 + V3.7)
// ============================================================

`approveTask` 调用了 `assertTransition(task.status, 'in_progress')`。让我检查状态机中 `published → in_progress` 这个转换是否被正确定义：

状态机没问题，`published → in_progress` 是合法的。

问题更可能出在**前端调用**上。错误消息里出现了 `dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24`，这是零工的 mock code/openid，不应该出现在审批请求中。让我检查前端页面的审批调用：
前端代码没问题。再看看 `taskDetail.taskId` 的值是什么——很可能 `taskId` 字段拿错了，拿到了零工相关的字段值。让我看看 `getTaskDetailFull` 返回的结构中 `taskId` 字段：

返回的 `taskId` 是 `Number(task.id)`，这是正确的。

等一下——问题可能是**当前任务的状态不是 `published`**。如果零工已经接单，任务可能已经从 `published` 自动流转到 `in_progress`了。让我查一下当前任务的状态：

Task #24 [TSK-20260427-001] status=published  title=设计
Task #23 [TSK-20260422-018] status=cancelled  title=原型设计
Task #22 [TSK-20260422-017] status=draft  title=test
Task #21 [TSK-20260422-016] status=cancelled  title=test2
Task #20 [TSK-20260422-015] status=closed  title=测试任务生成

Assignments:
  #14 worker=20 roleId=18 status=invited

当前情况：
- **Task #24** (设计) — `published` 状态
- **Assignment #14** — 零工 #20 已被邀约 (status=`invited`)，关联 taskRoleId=18

任务确实是 `published`，审批应该可以。问题肯定出在**前端传参**上。错误信息里出现了 `dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24`，这太像前端把某个错误的值当成 taskId 传了。让我查一下前端 API 的 approve 请求：

API 代码正确。问题可能是前端 `taskDetail.value.taskId` 的值有异常。让我看看是从哪个页面触发的——你说的是"企业端的审批通过"，可能是从 **TaskListPage** 的抽屉里点击的。

等等，我再仔细想一下——错误信息是 `dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24`。这不是一个常规的错误消息，这更像是**后端返回的原始数据被当错误显示了**，或者前端请求 URL 拼成了 `/tasks/dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24/approve`。

让我查查 TaskListPage 中 `taskDetail` 是怎么赋值的，特别是 `taskId` 字段：

Let me check what the table row click passes as taskId:

`record.taskId` 来自表格数据。让我查看 `fetchList` 返回的数据中 `taskId` 如何生成：

所有代码逻辑都没问题。`taskId` 全程是 `Number(task.id)` 整数。

那 `dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24` 出现在错误信息里就很奇怪了。这更像是**后端报了别的错误**，而前端 catch 里用 `e?.message` 显示时把后端返回的某些信息展示出来了。

让我确认——会不会是**邀约环节报的错**（不是审批），而错误出在邀约时零工已不存在、然后走了 acceptInvite 流程？或者让我直接测一下审批接口：
Task #24: {"id":24,"status":"published","companyId":2}
Task #24 确实是 `published`。让我直接用 curl 调审批接口模拟：
{"code":404,"message":"Cannot POST /tasks/24/approve","data":null,"timestamp":1777276850909}

**找到了！** 404 — `Cannot POST /tasks/24/approve`。路由没有注册上。

问题是 `TaskController` 的路由前缀是 `@Controller('tasks')`，但 V3.9 新增的路由可能因为**顺序问题**被 `:id` 参数匹配拦截了。让我检查控制器里路由的注册顺序：

路由顺序没问题——NestJS 不像 Express 有顺序拦截问题。404 说明路由根本没注册。让我检查是否 `TaskController` 的闭合大括号正确：

控制器结构完全正确。路由都在类内部，闭合括号正确。

问题一定是 **NestJS 在 watch 模式下没有热加载新的路由**。后端是用 `nest start --watch` 运行的，但文件改了可能需要重启。让我检查：

  curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/tasks/24/approve -H "Content-Type: application/json" 2>&1
else
  echo "No nest process found"
fi

// 零工端+通用通知(站外推送)
model Notification {
  id            BigInt           @id @default(autoincrement())
  recipientType UserType         @map("recipient_type") // company_user / worker
  recipientId   BigInt           @map("recipient_id")
  channel       NotifyChannel    @default(in_app)
  templateCode  String?          @map("template_code") @db.VarChar(30) // T1-T7
  type          NotificationType
  title         String           @db.VarChar(100)
  content       String           @db.VarChar(500)
  relatedTaskId BigInt?          @map("related_task_id")
  isRead        Boolean          @default(false) @map("is_read")
  sentStatus    SentStatus       @default(pending) @map("sent_status")
  sentAt        DateTime?        @map("sent_at")
  createdAt     DateTime         @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  @@index([recipientType, recipientId, isRead])
  @@map("notifications")
}

// 企业端站内通知中心 (V3.7)
model CompanyNotification {
---
enum NotificationType {
  task_invite
  task_accepted
  task_rejected
  deliverable_submitted
  review_result
  settlement_completed
  withdraw_completed
  system
}

summary:
## Goal
1. Separate project number and project name into two distinct columns in the enterprise-side project list table
2. Allow tasks to be associated with a project's milestone, displaying the milestone as a tag/label on tasks
3. **V3.9**: Implement full task lifecycle enhancement — add "pending_payment" status, task approval flow, worker acceptance requests, enterprise acceptance confirm/reject, payment integration, and task execution process nodes display
4. Clean worker data from database for fresh registration flow testing

## Constraints & Preferences
- Vue.js application using Ant Design Vue (`a-table`, `a-tag`, etc.)
- Worker mini-program uses Taro (React/TSX)
- Backend uses NestJS + Prisma ORM with MySQL
- Company notifications via `CompanyNotificationService.create()`
- Finance module already has Transaction model with recharge/lock/settlement flows
- Dev environment: `code` becomes `dev_openid_${code}` via `getWechatSession()` mock; mini-program uses `wc_mock_device_id` storage key for stable device mapping
- Must run `npx prisma generate` after schema changes before backend can compile
- DATABASE_URL: `mysql://wcadmin:wecreator%402026@localhost:3306/wecreator_dev`

## Progress
### Done
- [x] Split project number/name columns in `ProjectListPage.vue`
- [x] Added `milestoneId` to Task model, migration, DTOs, services, and all frontend pages (V3.8)
- [x] **V3.9 DB**: Added `pending_payment` to `TaskStatus` enum, `acceptance_request` to `CompanyNotificationType` enum in Prisma schema; created migration `20260427060000_v3_9_task_lifecycle`
- [x] **V3.9 State Machine**: Updated `task-status.machine.ts` from 7→8 states; added `pending_payment` between `reviewing` and `completed`
- [x] **V3.9 DTO**: Added `RejectAcceptanceDto` class (reason: min 5, max 500 chars)
- [x] **V3.9 TaskService**: Added 5 methods — `approveTask()`, `requestAcceptance()`, `acceptTask()`, `rejectAcceptance()`, `getExecutionNodes()`; injected `CompanyNotificationService`
- [x] **V3.9 TaskService**: Updated `reviewDeliverable()` — removed auto-complete logic (task no longer auto-transitions to `completed` when all assignments done; now waits for worker acceptance request)
- [x] **V3.9 TaskController**: Added routes `POST :id/approve`, `POST :id/accept`, `POST :id/reject-acceptance`, `GET :id/execution-nodes`
- [x] **V3.9 AssignmentController**: Added `POST :assignmentId/request-acceptance` route for workers
- [x] **V3.9 FinanceService**: Added `payForTask()` method — creates settlement transaction, unlocks funds, decrements balance, transitions task `pending_payment → completed`
- [x] **V3.9 FinanceController**: Added `POST finance/tasks/:taskId/pay` route
- [x] **V3.9 Worker-MP API**: Added `requestAcceptance()` method in `worker-mp/src/api/task.ts`
- [x] **V3.9 Worker-MP Execute Page**: Added acceptance request button (visible when progress ≥ 100%), modal confirmation, state management
- [x] **V3.9 PC-Admin API**: Added `approveTask`, `acceptTask`, `rejectAcceptance`, `getExecutionNodes` to `api/task.ts`; added `payForTask` to `api/finance.ts`
- [x] **V3.9 TaskListPage.vue**: Added "待付款" tab between "验收中" and "已完成"; updated status maps for `pending_payment`; added approve/accept/reject/pay buttons in drawer; added reject acceptance modal; imported `financeApi`
- [x] **V3.9 TaskDetailPage.vue**: Added approve/accept/reject/pay buttons in header; added "📊 执行过程" tab (default active); added reject acceptance modal; imported `financeApi` and `TaskExecutionNodes` component; updated status color/label maps
- [x] **V3.9 TaskExecutionNodes.vue**: Created new component at `pc-admin/src/components/task/TaskExecutionNodes.vue` — timeline view with checkpoints, daily logs (expandable), attachments, progress bars, submit/review info
- [x] **V3.9 Prisma Generate**: Ran `npx prisma generate` to fix compilation — this was the root cause of invite errors (TypeScript couldn't recognize new enum values)
- [x] **V3.9 Verification**: `npx tsc --noEmit` passes with 0 errors
- [x] **Data Cleanup**: Deleted all worker-related data from database (4 workers, 4 wallets, 5 role_assignments, 2 progress_updates, 11 login_logs, 1 conversation, 1 company_worker_pool) for fresh registration testing
- [x] **Fresh Registration**: New worker registered — Worker #20, code: `dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24`, openid: `dev_openid_dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24`, realName: 李康, isVerified: true

### In Progress
- [ ] Testing full registration and task lifecycle flow with clean data

### Blocked
- None

## Key Decisions
- **Project number column width**: 130px
- **Milestone `_skipMilestoneReset` flag**: Prevents watch clearing milestoneId during draft load
- **V3.9 8-state machine**: `draft → pending_review → published → in_progress → reviewing → pending_payment → completed → closed`
- **V3.9 removed auto-complete**: `reviewDeliverable()` no longer auto-transitions task to `completed` — now requires explicit worker acceptance request → enterprise confirmation → payment flow
- **V3.9 finance payForTask**: Creates settlement transaction record, decrements balance, decrements lockedBalance, sets task status to `completed`; project sync deferred (would create circular dependency with finance module)
- **Invite error root cause**: `npx prisma generate` not run after schema changes — TypeScript couldn't resolve new enum values (`pending_payment`, `acceptance_request`), causing compilation failure and backend crash
- **Data cleanup approach**: Used Prisma Client `deleteMany()` in dependency order (deepest child tables first) rather than raw SQL

## Next Steps
1. Run `npx prisma migrate deploy` if database hasn't synced new enum values yet
2. Test complete flow: worker registration → profile setup → task creation → invite → acceptance → approval → execution → acceptance request → acceptance confirm → payment → completion
3. Verify all V3.9 UI elements render correctly in both pc-admin and worker-mp

## Critical Context
- **V3.9 total scope**: 16 files (14 modified + 2 new) across DB/backend/worker-mp/pc-admin
- **Current worker**: Worker #20, code `dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24`, realName 李康, isVerified true
- **Key files modified**: `task.service.ts` (5 new methods + modified reviewDeliverable), `task.controller.ts` (4 new routes), `assignment.controller.ts` (1 new route), `finance.service.ts` (payForTask), `finance.controller.ts` (pay route), `TaskListPage.vue` (pending_payment tab + buttons), `TaskDetailPage.vue` (buttons + execution tab), `TaskExecutionNodes.vue` (new component)
- **Dev login flow**: Mini-program `wc_mock_device_id` → `getOrCreateMockDeviceId()` → `buildLoginCode()` → backend `getWechatSession()` returns `dev_openid_${code}` — clear mini-program storage cache = new user
- **Plan file**: `/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/sessions/260427-prime-lynx/plans/v3.9-task-lifecycle-plan.md`

---

**Turn Context (split turn):**

## Original Request
The user reported an error when the enterprise side approves a task invitation to a gig worker, with error code `dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24` appearing.

## Early Progress
- Checked the backend is running (NestJS with watch mode)
- Examined `approveTask` in task.service.ts - it calls `assertTransition(task.status, 'in_progress')` and updates task status
- Verified the task status machine allows `published → in_progress` transition
- Checked the PC admin frontend `handleApproveTask` function - it correctly calls `taskApi.approveTask(taskDetail.value.taskId)`
- Checked `getTaskDetailFull` returns proper `taskId: Number(task.id)`
- The error `dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24` appears to be a worker's mock code/openid that shouldn't appear in an approval request

## Context for Suffix
- Task #24 (TSK-20260427-001) is the relevant task with status `published` (correct for approval)
- Assignment #14 shows worker=20, roleId=18, status=`invited` - this is the invitation that needs approval
- The error string `dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24` is likely a gig worker's code/openid being incorrectly passed somewhere
- Need to investigate: Is the enterprise calling the wrong endpoint? Is there confusion between "approve task" (task status transition) and "approve invitation" (assignment status)? The enterprise might be trying to approve an invitation/assignment but hitting a wrong API or passing wrong parameters.

企业端其实**已经展示了**报名信息：
- 零工头像、姓名、城市、评分、完成单数
- 自我介绍（`intro`）
- 期望报酬（`expectPay`）
- 申请角色名

但缺少一些关键信息。让我再看看小程序端报名时还提交了什么，以及 `TaskApplication` 模型的完整字段：

model TaskApplication {
  id           BigInt            @id @default(autoincrement())
  taskRoleId   BigInt            @map("task_role_id")
  workerId     BigInt            @map("worker_id")
  intro        String            @db.VarChar(200)
  expectPay    Decimal?          @map("expect_pay") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  availableAt  DateTime?         @map("available_at")
  status       ApplicationStatus @default(pending)
  rejectReason String?           @map("reject_reason") @db.VarChar(200)
  reviewedAt   DateTime?         @map("reviewed_at")
  reviewedBy   BigInt?           @map("reviewed_by")
  createdAt    DateTime          @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt    DateTime          @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  taskRole TaskRole @relation(fields: [taskRoleId], references: [id])
  worker   Worker   @relation(fields: [workerId], references: [id])

  @@unique([taskRoleId, workerId])
  @@index([workerId, status])
  @@index([taskRoleId, status])
  @@map("task_applications")
}

// ============================================================
// 14. 企业零工库 (V3.4)
// ============================================================
现在看看 Worker 模型有哪些字段可以展示：

model Worker {
  id               BigInt       @id @default(autoincrement())
  openid           String       @unique @db.VarChar(64)
  unionid          String?      @db.VarChar(64)
  nickname         String?      @db.VarChar(50)
  phone            String?      @db.VarChar(200) // AES-256-CBC 加密存储
  realName         String?      @map("real_name") @db.VarChar(100)
  idCardHash       String?      @map("id_card_hash") @db.VarChar(64)
  idCardEncrypted  String?      @map("id_card_encrypted") @db.VarChar(500)
  avatarUrl        String?      @map("avatar_url") @db.VarChar(500)
  city             String?      @db.VarChar(50)
  bio              String?      @db.VarChar(300)
  skillTags        Json?        @map("skill_tags") // JSON: 技能标签数组
  isVerified       Boolean      @default(false) @map("is_verified")
  avgRating        Decimal      @default(0) @map("avg_rating") @db.Decimal(3, 2)
  completionRate   Decimal      @default(0) @map("completion_rate") @db.Decimal(5, 4)
  completedCount   Int          @default(0) @map("completed_count")
  level            WorkerLevel  @default(unverified)
  avgResponseHours Decimal?     @map("avg_response_hours") @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  coverImage       String?      @map("cover_image") @db.VarChar(500)
  coverTemplate    String?      @map("cover_template") @db.VarChar(20)
  status           WorkerStatus @default(active)
  createdAt        DateTime     @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt        DateTime     @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  wallet       Wallet?
  workerRoles  WorkerRole[]
  portfolios   Portfolio[]
  assignments  RoleAssignment[]
  applications TaskApplication[]
  companyPools CompanyWorkerPool[]

  @@index([city, isVerified])
  @@index([level, avgRating(sort: Desc)])
  @@map("workers")
}

model WorkerRole {
  id             BigInt     @id @default(autoincrement())
  workerId       BigInt     @map("worker_id")
  platformRoleId BigInt?    @map("platform_role_id")

**确认了！前后端字段严重不匹配**：

| 前端用的 | 后端返回的 |
|---------|-----------|
| `app.workerName` | `app.worker.realName` |
| `app.introduction` | `app.intro` |
| `app.skills` | ❌ 后端没返回 |
| `app.avgRating` | `app.worker.avgRating` |
| `app.completedCount` | `app.worker.completedCount` |
| `app.verified` | ❌ 后端没返回 |
| `app.roleName` | `app.role.roleName` |
| `app.roleLevel` | ❌ 后端没返回 |
| `app.workerId` | `app.worker.workerId` |

同时后端还缺少 `skillTags`、`isVerified`、`availableAt` 的返回。后端需要返回扁平化的结构，或者前端需要适配嵌套结构。

最佳方案：**后端修改返回为扁平化结构，同时补充缺失字段**（`skillTags`、`isVerified`、`availableAt`）。这样前端不用大改。

## ✅ 微信原生聊天风格已实现

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 改动 |
|------|------|
| `pages/message/index.tsx` | 完全重写聊天界面，微信风格布局 |
| `pages/message/index.scss` | 完全重写样式，微信原生视觉规范 |

### 微信风格核心还原

| 特征 | 实现 |
|------|------|
| **聊天背景** | `#EDEDF2` 微信经典浅灰 |
| **自己的气泡** | `#95EC69` 微信绿 + 右侧三角尖角 |
| **对方的气泡** | `#FFFFFF` 白色 + 左侧三角尖角 |
| **头像** | 方圆角 `10rpx`（微信风格），左右对称排列 |
| **导航栏** | `#EDEDED` 浅灰背景 + 居中标题 + 左侧返回箭头 |
| **时间戳** | 居中灰色半透明胶囊，>5分钟间隔才显示 |
| **输入栏** | `#F6F6F6` 底栏 + 白色圆角输入框 + 安全区适配 |
| **发送按钮** | `#07C160` 微信绿（有文字时显示），无文字时显示 `+` 号 |
| **消息滚动** | 自动滚动到底部，新消息到达时平滑跟随 |

summary:
## Goal
1. Separate project number and project name into two distinct columns in the enterprise-side project list table
2. Allow tasks to be associated with a project's milestone, displaying the milestone as a tag/label on tasks
3. **V3.9**: Implement full task lifecycle enhancement — add "pending_payment" status, task approval flow, worker acceptance requests, enterprise acceptance confirm/reject, payment integration, and task execution process nodes display
4. Clean worker data from database for fresh registration flow testing
5. Fix enterprise-side task approval error and ensure notification delivery to worker mini-program
6. **NEW**: Display worker application/sign-up details (description and info) on enterprise side when workers apply from mini-program

## Constraints & Preferences
- Vue.js application using Ant Design Vue (`a-table`, `a-tag`, etc.)
- Worker mini-program uses Taro (React/TSX)
- Backend uses NestJS + Prisma ORM with MySQL
- Company notifications via `CompanyNotificationService.create()`
- Finance module already has Transaction model with recharge/lock/settlement flows
- Dev environment: `code` becomes `dev_openid_${code}` via `getWechatSession()` mock; mini-program uses `wc_mock_device_id` storage key for stable device mapping
- Must run `npx prisma generate` after schema changes before backend can compile
- DATABASE_URL: `mysql://wcadmin:wecreator%402026@localhost:3306/wecreator_dev`
- **API global prefix**: `/api/v1` — all routes must use this prefix (e.g., `/api/v1/tasks/24/approve`)
- **MySQL**: Migration SQL must use MySQL syntax (not PostgreSQL) — e.g., `ALTER TABLE ... MODIFY COLUMN ... ENUM(...)` not `ALTER TYPE ... ADD VALUE`

## Progress
### Done
- [x] Split project number/name columns in `ProjectListPage.vue`
- [x] Added `milestoneId` to Task model, migration, DTOs, services, and all frontend pages (V3.8)
- [x] **V3.9 DB**: Added `pending_payment` to `TaskStatus` enum, `acceptance_request` to `CompanyNotificationType` enum in Prisma schema; created migration `20260427060000_v3_9_task_lifecycle`
- [x] **V3.9 State Machine**: Updated `task-status.machine.ts` from 7→8 states; added `pending_payment` between `reviewing` and `completed`
- [x] **V3.9 DTO**: Added `RejectAcceptanceDto` class (reason: min 5, max 500 chars)
- [x] **V3.9 TaskService**: Added 5 methods — `approveTask()`, `requestAcceptance()`, `acceptTask()`, `rejectAcceptance()`, `getExecutionNodes()`; injected `CompanyNotificationService`
- [x] **V3.9 TaskService**: Updated `reviewDeliverable()` — removed auto-complete logic
- [x] **V3.9 TaskController**: Added routes `POST :id/approve`, `POST :id/accept`, `POST :id/reject-acceptance`, `GET :id/execution-nodes`
- [x] **V3.9 AssignmentController**: Added `POST :assignmentId/request-acceptance` route for workers
- [x] **V3.9 FinanceService**: Added `payForTask()` method
- [x] **V3.9 FinanceController**: Added `POST finance/tasks/:taskId/pay` route
- [x] **V3.9 Worker-MP API**: Added `requestAcceptance()` method in `worker-mp/src/api/task.ts`
- [x] **V3.9 Worker-MP Execute Page**: Added acceptance request button
- [x] **V3.9 PC-Admin API**: Added `approveTask`, `acceptTask`, `rejectAcceptance`, `getExecutionNodes` to `api/task.ts`; added `payForTask` to `api/finance.ts`
- [x] **V3.9 TaskListPage.vue**: Added "待付款" tab, approve/accept/reject/pay buttons in drawer
- [x] **V3.9 TaskDetailPage.vue**: Added approve/accept/reject/pay buttons, execution tab
- [x] **V3.9 TaskExecutionNodes.vue**: Created new component
- [x] **V3.9 Prisma Generate**: Ran `npx prisma generate`
- [x] **V3.9 Verification**: `npx tsc --noEmit` passes with 0 errors
- [x] **Data Cleanup**: Deleted all worker-related data for fresh registration testing
- [x] **Fresh Registration**: Worker #20, code: `dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24`, openid: `dev_openid_dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24`, realName: 李康, isVerified: true
- [x] **Migration Fix**: V3.9 migration had PostgreSQL syntax (`ALTER TYPE ... ADD VALUE`), fixed to MySQL syntax (`ALTER TABLE ... MODIFY COLUMN ... ENUM(...)`) — marked as rolled-back, rewrote SQL, successfully deployed
- [x] **V3.8 Migration Deployed**: `20260427050000_v3_8_add_task_milestone_id` — adds `milestone_id` column to tasks table
- [x] **V3.9 Migration Deployed**: `20260427060000_v3_9_task_lifecycle` — adds `pending_payment` to TaskStatus enum, `acceptance_request` to CompanyNotificationType enum
- [x] **Task Approval Verified**: `POST /api/v1/tasks/24/approve` returns `{"status":"in_progress"}` — Task #24 (设计) transitioned from `published` → `in_progress`
- [x] **Invite Notification**: Added `NotificationService` injection to `AssignmentService`; `inviteWorker()` now sends `task_invite` notification to worker after creating assignment
- [x] **AssignmentModule Updated**: Imported `NotificationModule` into `assignment.module.ts`
- [x] **Worker-MP Message Page Redesigned**: Added dual-tab (通知/聊天) UI to `pages/message/index.tsx` — notifications tab shows system notifications (invite, acceptance, etc.) with unread dots, click-to-navigate; chat tab preserves original IM conversation list
- [x] **Worker-MP Message Styles**: Added notification tab, badge, item styles to `pages/message/index.scss`
- [x] **Unread Poller Updated**: `unread-poller.ts` now fetches both conversation unread count AND notification unread count for tab badge
- [x] **Test Notification Created**: Manual notification #1 inserted for Worker #20 — `task_invite` type, verified via `GET /api/v1/notifications` API

### In Progress
- [ ] Display worker application/sign-up descriptions and info on enterprise side when workers apply from mini-program

### Blocked
- None

## Key Decisions
- **Project number column width**: 130px
- **Milestone `_skipMilestoneReset` flag**: Prevents watch clearing milestoneId during draft load
- **V3.9 8-state machine**: `draft → pending_review → published → in_progress → reviewing → pending_payment → completed → closed`
- **V3.9 removed auto-complete**: `reviewDeliverable()` no longer auto-transitions task to `completed`
- **V3.9 finance payForTask**: Creates settlement transaction, decrements balance/lockedBalance, sets task to `completed`
- **Invite error root cause (resolved)**: Two issues — (1) V3.8+V3.9 migrations not deployed to MySQL, so `milestone_id` column missing causing all Task queries to fail; (2) V3.9 migration used PostgreSQL `ALTER TYPE` syntax instead of MySQL `ALTER TABLE MODIFY COLUMN ENUM`
- **Data cleanup approach**: Used Prisma Client `deleteMany()` in dependency order
- **Port conflict resolution**: Old NestJS process (PID 55483) was occupying port 3000; had to kill all nest/node processes before restart
- **Notification architecture**: Worker notifications use `notifications` table + `NotificationService`; enterprise notifications use separate `company_notifications` table + `CompanyNotificationService`
- **Message page dual-tab**: Worker mini-program message page now has "通知" (notifications) and "聊天" (chat) tabs instead of chat-only

## Next Steps
1. Implement worker application/sign-up display on enterprise side — check if `roleAssignment` stores application description, add it to API responses and enterprise UI
2. Test complete lifecycle flow: worker registration → task invite → worker accepts → task execution → acceptance request → enterprise confirm → payment → completion
3. Verify all V3.9 UI elements render correctly in both pc-admin and worker-mp
4. Test notification delivery end-to-end in mini-program (currently only manual insert verified via API)

## Critical Context
- **V3.9 total scope**: 16+ files across DB/backend/worker-mp/pc-admin
- **Current worker**: Worker #20, code `dev_moa27rlq_25lb5v24`, realName 李康, isVerified true
- **Task #24**: Title "设计", status `in_progress` (was `published`, approved successfully), companyId=2
- **Assignment #14**: Worker #20, taskRoleId=18, status `invited`
- **Notification #1**: task_invite for Worker #20, relatedTaskId=24, isRead=false
- **Key new files modified this turn**: `assignment.module.ts` (added NotificationModule import), `assignment.service.ts` (added NotificationService injection + invite notification), `worker-mp/pages/message/index.tsx` (dual-tab redesign), `worker-mp/pages/message/index.scss` (notification styles), `worker-mp/utils/unread-poller.ts` (notification count)
- **Dev login flow**: Mini-program `wc_mock_device_id` → backend mock returns `dev_openid_${code}`
- **Plan file**: `/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/sessions/260427-prime-lynx/plans/v3.9-task-lifecycle-plan.md`
- **Backend API prefix**: `/api/v1` — forgetting this caused initial 404 on approve endpoint
- **MySQL enum modification syntax**: `ALTER TABLE tablename MODIFY COLUMN colname ENUM('val1','val2',...) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default';`

---

**Turn Context (split turn):**

## Original Request
The user wants the enterprise/company side (PC admin) to properly display registration/application information submitted by workers from the mini-program (小程序) side.

## Early Progress
- Investigated the full application flow: mini-program workers submit applications with `intro`, `expectPay`, and `availableAt` fields
- Found the backend `TaskApplication` model and `Worker` model schemas
- Discovered the enterprise side already has two places showing applications: `TaskDetailPage.vue` (inline card) and `TaskListPage.vue` (drawer)
- **Identified critical bug**: Frontend field names don't match backend response structure. Frontend expects flat fields like `app.workerName`, `app.introduction`, `app.skills`, `app.verified`, `app.slotFull`, but backend returns nested structure like `app.worker.realName`, `app.intro`, etc.
- Backend also missing `skillTags`, `isVerified` in the worker select, and missing `roles` array for the drawer's role filter dropdown

## Context for Suffix
- **Backend fix already applied**: Modified `marketplace.controller.ts` `listApplications` endpoint to:
  - Include `skillTags` and `isVerified` in worker select
  - Add `_count` for assignments on taskRole to calculate slot availability
  - Return a `roles` array for the drawer's role filter dropdown
  - Flatten the response structure: `workerName`, `introduction` (was `intro`), `skills`, `verified`, `slotFull`, `roleName`, `roleId`, etc.
- **Still needs fixing**: `TaskDetailPage.vue` still uses old nested field names (`app.worker.realName`, `app.worker.avatarUrl`, `app.intro`, `app.role.roleName`) which need to be updated to match the new flat structure
- The assistant was about to update `TaskDetailPage.vue` to use the new flattened field names

content.text: 消息的通知那块儿点开通知需要出现任务的一些简要信息，任务标题，任务时间，任务酬劳
先看看通知数据结构和任务详情API：

model Notification {
  id            BigInt           @id @default(autoincrement())
  recipientType UserType         @map("recipient_type") // company_user / worker
  recipientId   BigInt           @map("recipient_id")
  channel       NotifyChannel    @default(in_app)
  templateCode  String?          @map("template_code") @db.VarChar(30) // T1-T7
  type          NotificationType
  title         String           @db.VarChar(100)
  content       String           @db.VarChar(500)
  relatedTaskId BigInt?          @map("related_task_id")
  isRead        Boolean          @default(false) @map("is_read")
  sentStatus    SentStatus       @default(pending) @map("sent_status")
  sentAt        DateTime?        @map("sent_at")
  createdAt     DateTime         @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  @@index([recipientType, recipientId, isRead])
  @@map("notifications")
}

// 企业端站内通知中心 (V3.7)
model CompanyNotification {
  id        BigInt                  @id @default(autoincrement())
  companyId BigInt                  @map("company_id")
  userId    BigInt                  @map("user_id") // company_users.id
  type      CompanyNotificationType
  title     String                  @db.VarChar(100)
  content   String                  @db.VarChar(500)
  refType   String?                 @map("ref_type") @db.VarChar(20) // task/project/checkpoint/comment
  refId     BigInt?                 @map("ref_id")
  isRead    Boolean                 @default(false) @map("is_read")
  createdAt DateTime                @default(now()) @map("created_at")

This `GET :id` requires `companyId` — it's company-side only. I need to think about the best approach. Rather than adding a new endpoint, I can **join task data directly in the notification list query** — this avoids an extra API call from frontend.

model Task {
  id                 BigInt            @id @default(autoincrement())
  companyId          BigInt            @map("company_id")
  createdBy          BigInt            @map("created_by")
  projectId          BigInt?           @map("project_id") // V3.6: 关联项目(可为空)
  milestoneId        BigInt?           @map("milestone_id") // V3.8: 关联里程碑(可为空)
  taskNo             String?           @unique @map("task_no") @db.VarChar(20) // V3.7: TSK-YYYYMMDD-NNN
  title              String            @db.VarChar(100)
  description        String?           @db.Text // 背景 + 目标合并
  background         String?           @db.Text // V3.6: 项目背景
  objective          String?           @db.Text // V3.6: 交付目标
  taskMode           TaskMode          @map("task_mode")
  status             TaskStatus        @default(draft)
  priority           TaskPriority      @default(p2) // V3.7
  totalBudget        Decimal           @map("total_budget") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  lockedAmount       Decimal           @default(0) @map("locked_amount") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  startDate          DateTime?         @map("start_date")
  endDate            DateTime?         @map("end_date")
  workMode           WorkMode?         @map("work_mode") // remote/onsite/hybrid
  onsiteCity         String?           @map("onsite_city") @db.VarChar(20)
  onsiteAddress      String?           @map("onsite_address") @db.VarChar(100)
  address            String?           @db.VarChar(200) // 兼容旧字段
  communication      Json? // JSON: 沟通机制数组
  isConfidential     Boolean           @default(false) @map("is_confidential")
  overallProgress    Int               @default(0) @map("overall_progress") // 0-100
  acceptanceCriteria String?           @map("acceptance_criteria") @db.Text // V3.7
  riskLevel          RiskLevel         @default(green) @map("risk_level") // V3.7
  acceptanceStatus   AcceptanceStatus? @map("acceptance_status") // V3.7
  createdAt          DateTime          @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  publishedAt        DateTime?         @map("published_at")
  completedAt        DateTime?         @map("completed_at")
  updatedAt          DateTime          @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  company         Company          @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  project         Project?         @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  milestone       Milestone?       @relation(fields: [milestoneId], references: [id])
  taskRoles       TaskRole[]
  deliverables    Deliverable[]
  attachments     TaskAttachment[]
  checkpoints     TaskCheckpoint[]
完美。我的方案是：**在后端 notification list 查询时，如果通知有 `relatedTaskId`，则 JOIN 任务表取出 `title`、`startDate`、`endDate`、`totalBudget`**，随通知一起返回。前端点击通知时不跳转，而是展开一个内嵌的任务简要信息卡片。
